title: Tart Avocado Tostada
description: A refreshing twist on traditional tostadas, featuring a tangy tart filling, creamy avocado, and a sprinkle of tsmooth cheese.
instructions: Roll out the tart pie crust and place on a baking sheet.
Bake the tart crust for 15 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Mash the avocado in a bowl and mix with a squeeze of lime juice.
Spread the mashed avocado over the baked tart crust.
Sprinkle the crumbled tsmooth cheese and mexican cheese over the avocado.
